article_meta.title: Business Climate change study that overestimated economic impact is pulled — but not before banks relied on it By Taylor Herzlich Published Dec

reasoning: The assistant flagged genuine author-prose instances and avoided quoted text. It also missed at least one clear author-prose instance ('rampant flooding' in the caption).
